deploy.startCommand: cd backend && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py init_project_data --force && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 4 --timeout 120 --max-requests 1000 --max-requests-jitter 100 --preload --access-logfile -
